versions.version_description: Different key, some chord changes, optimized for use with autoscroll.

My version of "Kissed from a rose" is 4 semi-notes higher than the original. So it's especially suitable for higher voices. Some parts (like the bridge) are modified and were inspired by this cover https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C3ixiCgug-8 of the song. Every chord marked with a star is supposed to be played as a barre chord. You could also play the intro on your guitar instead of singing it. I hope you have fun playing it.
I couldn't find a complete version of the song with tabs for the "solos" and normal chords for the verses and choruses and lyrics for everything, so I made one based on the already existing ones.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab][Chords for intro]
    [ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
e|--3--|--1--|--3--|
B|--3--|--1--|--0--|
G|--3--|--2--|--0--|
D|--5--|--3--|--0--|
A|--5--|--3--|--2--|
E|--3--|--1--|--3--|[/tab]

[Intro] (x2)
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Ba ya ya  ba da  ba da da da  Ba ya ya[/tab]

[tab](The verse uses the same chords as above plus the following chords)
    [ch]Eb[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
e|--3--|--0--|
B|--4--|--1--|
G|--3--|--0--|
D|--5--|--2--|
A|-----|--3--|
E|-----|-----|[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
  There used to be a graying tower alone on the sea[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
You became the light on the dark side of me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
But love remains a drug that's the high and not the pill[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
But did you know, that when it snows, my eyes become large[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
And the light that you shine can't be seen[/tab]

[tab](The chorus adds one more chord)
  [ch]Fsus4[/ch]
e|--1--|
B|--1--|
G|--3--|
D|--3--|
A|-----|
E|-----|[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, I compare you to a kiss from a rose on the grey[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Fsus4[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
The more I get of you the stranger it feels, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
And now that your rose is in bloom[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
A light hits the gloom on the grey[/tab]

[Instrumental] (x2)
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Ba ya ya  ba da  ba da da da  Ba ya ya[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
  There is so much a man can tell you, so much he can say[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
You remain my power, my pleasure, my pain[/tab]
[tab]N.C.     [ch]Eb[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, to me you're like a growing addiction that I can't deny[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
Won't you tell me, is that healthy, baby?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
But did you know, that when it snows[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
My eyes become large and the light that you shine can't be seen[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, I compare you to a kiss from a rose on the grey[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Fsus4[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
The more I get of you the stranger it feels, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
And now that your rose is in bloom[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][Bridge]
(The bridge adds 2 more chords)
    [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]C/F[/ch]
e|-----|--0--|
B|--3--|--1--|
G|--3--|--0--|
D|--3--|--3--|
A|--1--|-----|
E|-----|-----|[/tab]

(This first progression is played before the singing begins)
[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]

There is some overdubbing on the singing here but if you listen to it a couple times you'll get it.

[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C/F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
I've been kissed by a rose on the grey[/tab]

(The singing part of the bridge is played four times.  On the last repetition it 
will end on a G chord instead of an F so that it transitions back to the verse...)

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
   There is so much a man can tell you, so much he can say[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, to me you're like a growing addiction that I can't deny[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
Won't you tell me, is that healthy, baby?[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
But did you know, that when it snows[/tab]

[Chorus]

Baby, I compare you to a kiss from a rose on the grey[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Fsus4[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
The more I get of you the stranger it feels, yeah[/tab]
